tweets.name: Garry Tan
tweets.text:
Almost any decision in business and life can be decided by: 

1/ Are we lucky? Great. 
2/ Otherwise what is the smart gritty thing to do?

Lucky things happen to lucky people. But after that most of the manifold of outcomes requires true grit and smarts.

tweets.text:
We've moved to a world where image models are judged on accuracy - text, infographics, photorealism, rendering products / logos.

These models are great and have many valuable use cases.

But I sometimes find myself missing the age of aesthetics and random serendipity.
